creator: freebsd@bengrimm.net
text:
Note that during the same Poudriere run, ImageMagick was actually built, and it pulled in jpeg-turbo 3 while doing so. See https://www.bengrimm.net/paste_bug_272838.txt.

So ImageMagick wasn't orphaned because it was removed from the repository. It would have been removed because of a decision in pkg after pulling in the repository.
